Fed's Waller backs pausing rate cuts, citing uncertain inflation progression. Possibility of rate cuts later in 2024 if trends continue.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller noted that there was varied progress on inflation in January. He suggested that if the trends continue similarly to 2024, there may be a possibility of implementing rate cuts later in the year.

news.headline: Teleperformance in Malaysia recognized by Frost & Sullivan for leading in tailored customer experience solutions, Marking the news as of Feb. 17, 2025.
news.summary: A notable aspect of Teleperformance's operations in Malaysia is its integration of advanced technology, including GenAI, and immediate analytics with human compassion to provide customer-focused solutions, setting it apart in the industry. This evaluation by Frost & Sullivan in SINGAPORE on Feb. 17, 2025 emphasizes the effectiveness of these methods.

Trump-branded product buyers to get 3 free Official Trump tokens if purchased before Feb 15; Memecoin falls 8%.
news.summary: Customers who have bought President Donald Trump-branded merchandise are entitled to receive three free Official Trump (CRYPTO: TRUMP) tokens as a bonus. This offer applies to purchases of watches, fragrances, sneakers, or non-fungible tokens, and the number of tokens given remains constant regardless of the quantity of items bought. The deadline to claim these tokens is March 1, for purchases made before February 15. The giveaway marks the 1-month anniversary of the token's debut, with the intention to reward loyal customers.

news.headline: Argentine President Milei denies endorsing failed LIBRA token amid fraud lawsuits, stating he only shared information.
news.summary: The President of Argentina, Javier Milei, has refuted allegations stating that he "promoted" the LIBRA token, in the face of fraud lawsuits filed against him. Milei asserts that he was simply "spreading the word" about the token.

news.headline: TTC Global partners with Leapwork to bring AI-powered test automation to Microsoft users in New Zealand, enhancing software quality.
news.summary: In Auckland, New Zealand, TTC Global, a prominent provider of software quality engineering solutions, has recently revealed a significant partnership with Leapwork, a global leader in AI-driven test automation. This collaboration bolsters TTC Global's capacity to offer advanced test automation solutions to various businesses and organizations throughout New Zealand. Through this partnership, companies can elevate software quality, reduce risks, and propel digital transformation. Leapwork’s no-code, AI-powered approach will play a crucial role in this endeavor.

news.headline: European regulator suggests MiCA rules for crypto staff skills, seeks feedback on guidelines for staff at crypto service providers.
news.summary: The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA) is currently seeking input on draft guidelines for employees working at crypto asset service providers. Feedback is being requested on the proposed guidelines, which aim to provide regulatory standards for staff in this sector. Interested parties are encouraged to review the guidelines and offer their thoughts to ESMA. This initiative signifies the regulatory body's efforts to ensure proper oversight of the rapidly growing crypto asset industry.

news.headline: Rznomics' RZ-001 liver cancer drug secures Fast Track Designation in 2nd approval, based in South Korea.
news.summary: On February 14th, 2025, Rznomics, based in SEONGNAM, South Korea, revealed that their anticancer medication, RZ-001, utilizing Trans-splicing Ribozyme technology, has been granted a Fast Track Designation by the U.S. The drug had previously earned Fast Track Designation for brain cancer treatment and is now the second of its kind to receive this status.

news.headline: Vietnam approves major reforms to boost economy growth, aiming for a total GDP growth of 7% this year.
Topgolf Callaway Brands to release Q4 and FY 2024 financial results on Feb 24, 2025, after market closes. $MODG (NYSE)
news.summary: Carlsbad, CA - On February 17, 2025, Topgolf Callaway Brands Corp. (NYSE: MODG) disclosed plans to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 24, 2025, after the market closes.

news.headline: China may delay Tesla FSD approval amid trade war; Model Y deliveries to start in China this month.
news.summary: In light of President Trump's trade war with China, reports suggest that China might use Tesla's Full Self-Driving (FSD) approval as leverage. It is rumored that China could delay granting approval for Tesla's FSD technology. On a separate note, Tesla is gearing up to commence deliveries of the Model Y in China this month. This development could potentially impact Tesla's operations in China, a significant market for the company.

news.headline: LIBRA meme coin surges 18% after Argentine President Milei reposts buying tutorial, emphasizing complexity for common people.
news.summary: LIBRA, the meme coin controversially promoted by Argentina President Javier Milei, experienced a sharp increase on Monday after the president re-posted a tutorial on purchasing the token. Milei shared a post by economic advisor Dario Epstein, aiming to simplify the process of buying LIBRA for the average Argentine. The post detailed the necessary steps in a guide titled “How to buy LIBRA.” The message emphasized that the post was not an endorsement, tutorial, or recommendation, but was intended to highlight the difficulties faced by regular individuals when attempting to acquire this instrument or meme coin. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: SmartBear's Jo Alapatt to discuss AI-driven growth strategies at SaaS.Connect Summit in India on Feb 22-23, 2025.
news.summary: In Coimbatore, India, on February 22-23, 2025, Jo Alapatt will address AI-driven growth strategies at the SaaS.Connect Summit & Expo. The event, featuring speakers from Somerville, Mass., and Bangalore, will focus on the latest trends in artificial intelligence.

news.headline: KT&G achieves record revenue growth, operating profit increase, and enhanced global competitiveness, aiming to become top-tier player.
news.summary: In the latest news from SEOUL, South Korea on Feb. 18, 2025, there has been a remarkable achievement with record-breaking annual revenue. The company experienced significant growth in both revenue and operating profit, marking a successful turnaround in profitability. Additionally, there was an outstanding performance in Europe and various global markets, leading to the highest levels of success to date. These accomplishments have strengthened the company's core competitiveness, focusing on qualitative growth centered around generating profits.

news.headline: Xi Jinping emphasizes healthy growth of private sector in China, focusing on quality development. Beijing, Feb 17, 2025.
news.summary: On February 17, 2025, Xi Jinping, the general secretary of the Communist Party of China (CPC) Central Committee, emphasized the need to enhance the growth of the private sector in China for its healthy and high-quality development. This directive was reported by the Xinhua News Agency. Xi Jinping, who is also the Chinese President, stressed the importance of boosting this segment of the economy to further strengthen the country's overall economic landscape.

news.headline: Dow Jones Futures up with market near highs; Tesla accelerates new Model Y deliveries. Amazon, Broadcom approach buy points.
news.summary: Stock futures are increasing as the stock market sits near record highs. Tesla is accelerating the release of its new Model Y, leading to an uptick in the company's stock. Amazon and Broadcom are also approaching favorable buy points. Dow Jones futures are on the rise, reflecting optimism in the market as key companies make significant moves.

news.headline: Mitsubishi Electric researcher Dr. Stefano Di Cairano named IEEE Fellow; honored among 420,000 professionals worldwide.
news.summary: Mitsubishi Electric Corporation in Tokyo revealed that Dr. Stefano Di Cairano from Mitsubishi Electric Research Laboratories, Inc. in Cambridge, MA, USA, has been honored with the prestigious title of IEEE Fellow. The Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers, representing around 420,000 professionals in electrical engineering and ICT worldwide, selects less than 0.1% of its voting members as fellows each year for exceptional contributions.

news.headline: Macron aims to unite Europe, Ukraine, and Trump on peace talks.
Trust Stamp partners with Digital Platformer to enhance security in digital identity and financial services by combining advanced verification and decentralized security solutions.
news.summary: Trust Stamp and Digital Platformer have joined forces in a strategic partnership to provide a comprehensive solution integrating Trust Stamp's advanced identity verification features with Digital Platformer's state-of-the-art decentralized security offerings. This collaboration aims to enhance security measures and streamline processes, offering users an all-encompassing solution.
